alert.clockOffset: ساعة نظامك غير متزامنة مع الخادم بأكثر من 5 ثوانٍ. قد يسبب هذا مشاكل مع مصادقة مفتاح المرور والمصادقة الثنائية. يرجى مزامنة ساعتك إذا ظهرت مشاكل. الانحراف الحالي: {offset} ثانية/ثوانٍ.

serverConflict.title: حالة خادم متضاربة

serverConflict.contentNodeMaintenance: هذا الخادم على عقدة قيد الصيانة حالياً ولا يمكن الوصول إليه.
serverConflict.contentTransferring: هذا الخادم قيد النقل حالياً ولا يمكن الوصول إليه حتى اكتمال النقل.
serverConflict.contentInstallFailed: فشل تثبيت هذا الخادم ولا يمكن الوصول إليه حتى يتم الاعتراف بالفشل.
serverConflict.contentInstalling: هذا الخادم قيد التثبيت حالياً ولا يمكن الوصول إليه حتى يكتمل.
serverConflict.contentRestoringBackup: هذا الخادم يستعيد من نسخة احتياطية حالياً ولا يمكن الوصول إليه حتى يكتمل.

acknowledgeFailure.title: الاعتراف بفشل التثبيت
acknowledgeFailure.content: بالموافقة على فشل التثبيت هذا، أنت تؤكد أنك على علم بفشل التثبيت وقد اتخذت الخطوات اللازمة لحل المشكلة. سيسمح لك هذا باستعادة السيطرة على الخادم.

error.permissionRevoked: تم إغلاق الاتصال: تم إلغاء وصولك إلى هذا الخادم.

setupTwoFactor.descriptionQR: امسح رمز QR أعلاه باستخدام تطبيق المصادقة الثنائية الذي تختاره. ثم أدخل الرقم المكون من 6 أرقام الذي تم إنشاؤه في الحقل أدناه.

recoveryCodes.title: رموز الاستعادة

twoFactor.twoFactorDisabled: ليس لديك حالياً التحقق الثنائي مفعل على حسابك. انقر على الزر أدناه لبدء تكوينه.

apiKeyToken.descriptionCreated: Your new API key has been created. Make sure to copy it now, as it will not be shown again.
apiKeyToken.descriptionRecreated: Your API key has been recreated. Make sure to copy the new key now, as it will not be shown again.

create.title: Create API Key
create.subtitle: An application is requesting an API key to be created for your account.

alert.adminPermissions: This API key requests **admin permissions**. Anyone in possession of this key will be able to perform administrative actions on this panel in your name. Only continue if you absolutely trust the requesting application.
alert.callbackUrl: After creation, the new API key will be sent to **{url}**.

create.noPermissions: This API key will not have any permissions.
create.keyCreated: Your new API key has been created. Make sure to copy it now, as it will not be shown again.

alert.newPanelVersion: A new version is available for the panel! You are currently on {current} and the latest version is {latest}. You may want to consider upgrading. [Click here]({upgradeUrl}) to view upgrade instructions.

page.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to read the statistics that would have been here otherwise. For now, enjoy this bird.

alert.extensionUpdateErrors: There were errors checking for updates for some extensions.

page.panelVersion: Your panel is currently running version `{current}`. The latest available version is `{latest}`.
page.selectHistory: Select an update history to view.
page.extensionsUpToDate: All extensions are up to date.
page.extensionsOutdated: Some extensions are outdated or had errors when checking for updates.
page.nodesUpToDate: Seems like all nodes are up to date. ({failed} failed to check)
page.nodesOutdated: Some nodes are outdated, the latest available version is `{latest}`. ({outdated} outdated, {failed} failed to check)
page.databaseAgentHostsUpToDate: Seems like all database agent hosts are up to date. ({failed} failed to check)
page.databaseAgentHostsOutdated: Some database agent hosts are outdated, the latest available version is `{latest}`. ({outdated} outdated, {failed} failed to check)

page.nodesSynced: Seems like all nodes have a synced clock (within 5 seconds of panel clock). ({failed} failed to check)
page.nodesDesync: Some nodes have desync clocks (over 5 seconds off of the panel's clock). This can cause file download/console issues. ({desync} desync, {failed} failed to check)
page.debugResetNote: This setting will be reset to the default ({default}) when the application restarts.

form.telemetryEnabledDescription: Allow Calagopus to collect limited and anonymous usage data to help improve the application.

disableTelemetry.title: Confirm Disabling Telemetry
disableTelemetry.content: Are you sure you want to disable telemetry? Telemetry helps us improve Calagopus by providing anonymous usage data. Disabling telemetry will prevent any data from being sent.

enableRegistration.title: Confirm Enabling Registration
enableRegistration.content: Are you sure you want to enable registration? Enabling registration allows anyone to create an account on this panel. If you do not have a captcha configured, this may be a mistake.

changeStorageType.title: Confirm Changing Storage Type
changeStorageType.content: Are you sure you want to change the storage type? Changing the storage type will cause the application to look for assets (e.g. profile pictures) in a different location, which may result in missing assets if they are not moved to the new location manually.

alert.permissionsIntro: To ensure that the storage backend works correctly, please make sure the following subdirectories are publicly accessible over the "Public URL" you provided:
alert.permissionsAssets: This is where all admin assets (e.g., icons) will be stored.
alert.permissionsAvatars: This is where all user avatars will be stored.
alert.permissionsPublicData: This is where extensions can store public data (e.g., images).

toast.sent: Test email has been sent successfully.

page.title: Email Template Settings

alert.syntaxMiddle: templating syntax. Variables are referenced with

page.empty: Select a template from the sidebar to edit it.

reset.title: Reset to default
reset.content: This will discard your custom template for **{identifier}** and restore the built-in default. This cannot be undone.

toast.ipNotAllowed: Cannot use WebAuthn on an IP address.

changeRpId.title: Confirm Changing RP Id
changeRpId.content: Are you sure you want to change the RP Id? Changing the RP Id will break all existing Webauthn credentials and require users to re-register their devices. This can have significant consequences, so please make sure you understand the implications before proceeding.

form.maxFileManagerContentSearchSize: Max File Manager Content Search Size
form.allowOverwritingCustomDockerImageDescrip: If enabled, users will be able to overwrite the Docker image specified in the server configuration using the Eggs list, even if an admin has set a custom Docker image.
form.allowViewingInstallationLogsDescription: If enabled, users with console read permissions will also be able to view installation logs via the websocket connection. If disabled, installation logs will only be available for admins.
form.allowAcknowledgingInstallationFailureDes: If enabled, users will be able to acknowledge installation failures for servers that are in the "Install Failed" state, allowing them to attempt to start the server instead of having to wait for an admin. If disabled, only admins will be able to acknowledge installation failures.
form.allowViewingTransferProgressDescription: If enabled, users with console read permissions will also be able to view transfer progress logs via the websocket connection. If disabled, transfer progress logs will only be available for admins.
form.containerPreludeDescription: The terminal prelude used for some status-related messages in the server console.

form.allowChangingLanguageDescription: If enabled, users will be able to change their language preferences.

form.serverLogAdminActivityDescription: Enable or disable logging of admin activity on servers where the admin isn't an owner or subuser.
form.serverLogScheduleActivityDescription: Enable or disable logging of activity done by server schedules.

form.hitsDescription: Maximum number of requests allowed per window.

delete.title: Confirm Announcement Deletion
delete.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{title}**?

duplicate.content: Are you sure you want to duplicate **{title}**?

form.locationsDescription: Leave empty to apply to all locations.
form.nodesDescription: Leave empty to apply to all nodes.
form.backupConfigurationsDescription: Leave empty to apply to all backup configurations.

deleteAssets.title: Confirm Asset Deletion
deleteAssets.content: Are you sure you want to delete `{count}` assets?

deleteAsset.title: Delete Asset
deleteAsset.content: Are you sure you want to delete this asset? This action cannot be undone.

dropzone.title: Drop some files here to install as Extensions

form.removeMigrations: Do you want to remove & rollback the database migrations of this extension?

modal.title: Look Up by External ID
modal.notFound: No user found with that external ID.

form.adminDescription: Admin users have full, unrestricted access to everything on the panel.
form.frozenDescription: Frozen users cannot make any changes to their account information.
form.suspendedDescription: Suspended users cannot access the panel in any meaningful way.

form.urlDescription: Used for internal communication with the node.
form.publicUrlDescription: Used for websocket connections and downloads.
form.memoryDescription: The total memory available for servers on this node.
form.diskDescription: The total disk available for servers on this node.

alert.noLocations: You need to create at least one location before you can create nodes. Locations help organize your nodes geographically or logically.
alert.urlMissingPort: No port specified. The panel will connect to this node on port {port}. Wings listens on port {wingsPort} by default, so add it to the URL unless a reverse proxy on port {port} forwards to wings.

description.placeFile: Place this into the configuration file at `/etc/pterodactyl/config.yml` or run
description.settings: These values are used to generate the wings configuration below.
description.verify: Checks that both the panel (backend) and your browser (frontend) can reach wings.

form.panelUrlDescription: The URL wings uses to reach this panel.
form.sftpPortDescription: The port the wings SFTP server listens on.

alert.tokenWarning: The configuration below contains the node token. Reveal it only when needed.
alert.portMismatch: The node URL points at port {connectPort}, but this configuration makes wings listen on port {apiPort}. Unless a reverse proxy forwards port {connectPort} to wings, the panel will not be able to reach the node.
alert.verifyFailed: The panel could not reach the node: {error}
alert.verifyFrontendFailed: Your browser could not reach the node: {error}. The console, downloads and uploads depend on this connection. Check the (public) URL, TLS certificate and firewall.

toast.submittedNotApplied: Configuration was submitted but not applied.

toast.connectionLost: Lost connection to the node statistics stream.

page.title: Deployment Capacity
page.subtitle: Resources allocated to servers on this node, measured against the limits configured in node settings, not the physical machine capacity. Deployment only checks memory and disk.

toast.connectionLost: Lost connection to the node log stream.

delete.title: Confirm Node Allocations Deletion
delete.content: Are you sure you want to delete `{count}` allocations from **{name}**?

remove.title: Confirm Node Mount Removal
remove.content: Are you sure you want to remove the mount **{mount}** from **{name}**?

tooltip.backupNotOnSameNode: This backup is not on the same node as the server. It is not viewable from the Client API.

detach.title: Confirm Backup Detachment
detach.content: Are you sure you want to detach this backup from its server? It will not be deleted and can be reattached later.

reattach.title: Reattach Node Backup
reattach.description: Reattaching a node backup will link it to a server. This is useful if the backup is detached or you want to link it to a different server. Do note that this is not a transfer tool, unless the backup is considered remote (can be accessed by multiple nodes), the server must belong to the same node as the backup.

form.truncateDirectory: Do you want to empty the filesystem of this server before restoring the backup?

alert.forceWarning: Force deletion removes the backup even if its configuration is missing or the remote storage cannot be reached. The backup files themselves may not be fully cleaned up, leaving orphaned data behind.

form.transferBackupsDescription: Whether to transfer backups along with the servers.

confirm.title: Confirm Server Transfers
confirm.content: Are you sure you want to transfer `{count}` servers from **{from}** to **{to}**? This action cannot be undone.

allocationMode.none: None (scrap all allocations, server will not be automatically assigned new allocations on the destination node)
allocationMode.randomAll: Randomize all allocations (recommended to avoid incompatibility issues with destination node)
allocationMode.preservePorts: Preserve port numbers (reuses the same port numbers on the destination node where available, falls back to random allocations otherwise)
allocationMode.eggConfigDeployment: Assign allocations based on Egg deployment configuration (only works if the Egg has a deployment configuration and the destination node has compatible allocations)
allocationMode.eggConfigSelfAssignRange: Self-assign new allocations based on Egg port range (only works if the Egg has a port range and the destination node has compatible allocations)

powerAction.title: Confirm Power Action
powerAction.content: Are you sure you want to **{action}** {servers}?

delete.title: Confirm Node Deletion
delete.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}**?

modal.title: Look Up by External ID
modal.notFound: No server found with that external ID.

alert.selectEggForVariables: Please select an egg before you can configure variables.

form.cpuLimitDescription: The CPU limit in % that the server can use.
form.cpuLimitTooltip: 1 thread = 100%. 0 will not set a limit.
form.swapDescription: The amount of swap to give this server.
form.memoryDescription: The Memory limit of the server container.
form.memoryOverheadDescription: Hidden Memory that will be added to the container.
form.diskSpaceDescription: The disk limit of the server.
form.diskSpaceTooltip: 0 will not set a limit. This is a soft-limit unless the disk limiter is configured on Wings.
form.ioWeightDescription: The relative IO Weight of the server container compared to other containers.
form.ioWeightTooltip: 0-1000. May not work on all systems.
form.pinnedCpusDescription: The CPU cores this server is pinned to.
form.pinnedCpusTooltip: By index, e.g. 0, 1, 2. Leave empty to allow all cores.
form.hugepagesPassthroughEnabledDescription: Enable hugepages passthrough for the server (mounts /dev/hugepages into the container).
form.kvmPassthroughEnabledDescription: Enable KVM passthrough for the server (allows access to /dev/kvm inside the container).

confirmNoAllocation.title: No Primary Allocation Assigned
confirmNoAllocation.content: You are creating a server without assigning any primary allocation. Are you sure you want to continue?

remove.title: Confirm Allocation Removal
remove.content: Are you sure you want to remove **{allocation}**?

remove.title: Confirm Server Mount Removal
remove.content: Are you sure you want to remove the mount **{mount}** from **{name}**?

transfer.title: Transfer
transfer.content: Transfer this server and it's data to another node within this system.

tooltip.aioNotSupported: Transfers to the All-In-One node are not supported.

confirm.title: Confirm Server Transfer
confirm.content: Are you sure you want to transfer **{name}** from **{from}** to **{to}**?

alert.notAllBackupsSelected: You have not selected all backups to transfer, the remaining backups will become partially detached if the transfer completes successfully.

suspend.title: Suspend
suspend.content: This will suspend the server, stop any running processes, and immediately block the user from being able to access their files or otherwise manage the server through the panel or API.

modal.title: Confirm Server Suspension
modal.content: Are you sure you want to suspend **{name}**? This will stop the server and prevent it from starting. All running processes will be stopped and the user will not be able to access their files or otherwise manage the server through the panel or API.

unsuspend.title: Unsuspend
unsuspend.content: This will unsuspend the server, allowing it to start again. The user will be able to access their files and otherwise manage the server through the panel or API.

modal.title: Confirm Server Unsuspension
modal.content: Are you sure you want to unsuspend **{name}**? This will allow the server to start again. The user will be able to access their files and otherwise manage the server through the panel or API.

clearState.title: Clear State
clearState.content: This will clear the server state known by the panel.

modal.title: Confirm Server State Clear
modal.content: Are you sure you want to clear the state of **{name}**? This will clear any known pending transfers and status failures, please make sure it is safe to do this before clicking without reason.

delete.title: Delete
delete.content: This will delete the server and all of its data. This action cannot be undone.

modal.title: Confirm Server Deletion
modal.description: You are about to delete **{name}**. Are you sure?

form.deleteBackups: Do you want to delete backups of this server?

alert.forceWarning: Force deletion skips the normal shutdown sequence. The server files on the node may not be fully cleaned up, leaving orphaned data behind.

delete.title: Confirm Nest Deletion
delete.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}**?

form.deleteEggs: Do you want to delete all eggs in this nest?

toast.updatedFromRepository: {eggs} updated using their respective repository egg successfully.

deleteBulk.title: Confirm Egg Deletion

form.stripAnsiDescription: Removes ANSI control characters from the console output before matching startup completion.
form.createNewFileDescription: If enabled, the file will be created if it does not exist. If disabled, the file must already exist or the replacement will fail.
form.insertNewDescription: If enabled, if no existing value matches the "Match" field, the "Replace With" value will be inserted into the file. If disabled, if no match is found, no changes will be made to the file.
form.updateExistingDescription: If enabled, if a match is found, it will be replaced with the "Replace With" value. If disabled, the replacement will only insert new values and will fail if a match is found.
form.separatePortDescription: Separates the primary IP and port on the Console page instead of joining them with ":".

delete.title: Confirm Egg Deletion
delete.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}**?

form.rulesDescription: See https://laravel.com/docs/12.x/validation#available-validation-rules for the available validation rules.

delete.title: Confirm Egg Mount Removal

form.eggsEmpty: No eggs are configured. Create a nest and egg before creating an egg configuration.

form.userSelfAssignDescription: Allow users to create their own allocations from a specified port range.
form.requirePrimaryAllocationDescription: Whether users must always have a primary allocation.
form.dedicatedIpDescription: Assign a dedicated ip address for servers using this egg configuration.
form.primaryAllocationDescription: Configure a primary port assignment for deployment.
form.assignToVariableDescription: Optional environment variable to receive the assigned primary port.
Optional environment variable to receive the assigned port from this rule.

form.allowCustomStartupCommandDescription: Allow users to set their own, non-predefined startup commands.

drawer.noReadme: This egg does not have a README.

delete.title: Confirm Database Host Deletion
delete.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}**?

alert.forceWarning: Force deletion removes all databases on this host. The databases on the host itself may not be fully cleaned up, leaving orphaned data behind.

delete.title: Confirm Database Deletion
delete.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}**?

alert.forceWarning: Force deletion ignores the database lock and the host maintenance state. The database on the host itself may not be fully cleaned up, leaving orphaned data behind.

alert.urlMissingPort: No port specified. The panel will connect to this host on port {port}. The database agent listens on port {agentPort} by default, so add it to the URL unless a reverse proxy on port {port} forwards to the agent.

delete.title: Confirm Database Agent Host Deletion
delete.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}**?

alert.forceWarning: Force deletion removes all instances on this host. Instances the agent cannot be reached for may not be fully cleaned up, leaving orphaned data behind.

form.imageDescription: Pins the instance to a specific docker image. Leave empty to follow the template image, including future template updates.

deleteInstance.title: Confirm Managed Database Deletion
deleteInstance.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}**?

alert.forceWarning: Force deletion removes the instance even if the agent cannot be reached. The instance and its data on the host itself may not be fully cleaned up, leaving orphaned data behind.

description.placeFile: Place this into the configuration file at `/etc/calagopus-db-agent/config.yml` or run
description.settings: These values are used to generate the agent configuration below.
description.verify: Checks that the panel can reach the database agent at the host URL.

form.apiPortDescription: The port the database agent listens on.

alert.couldNotReach: Could not reach the database agent host: {error}
alert.tokenWarning: The configuration below contains the host token. Reveal it only when needed.
alert.portMismatch: The host URL points at port {connectPort}, but this configuration makes the agent listen on port {apiPort}. Unless a reverse proxy forwards port {connectPort} to the agent, the panel will not be able to reach the host.
alert.verifyFailed: The panel could not reach the host: {error}

toast.submittedNotApplied: Configuration was submitted but not applied.

toast.connectionLost: Connection to the database agent host was lost.

dropzone.title: Drop some files here to import as Database Agent Templates

toast.parseFailed: Failed to parse database agent template: {error}

form.socketPathDescription: The unix socket file path inside the database container, must match where the configured image actually creates its socket.
form.memoryDescription: The Memory limit of the database container.
form.swapDescription: The amount of swap to give this database.
form.diskDescription: The disk limit of the database.
form.diskTooltip: 0 will not set a limit. This is a soft-limit unless the disk limiter is configured on Wings.
form.cpuDescription: The CPU limit in % that the database can use.
form.cpuTooltip: 1 thread = 100%. 0 will not set a limit.
form.ioWeightDescription: The relative IO Weight of the database container compared to other containers.
form.ioWeightTooltip: 0-1000. May not work on all systems.

delete.title: Confirm Database Agent Template Deletion
delete.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}**?

applyUpdates.title: Apply Template Updates
applyUpdates.content: This will push the current configuration of **{name}** to the {count} selected instances. Instances will be restarted to apply the new configuration. Locked instances and instances on hosts in maintenance mode are skipped.
applyUpdates.contentAll: This will push the current configuration of **{name}** to every outdated instance, including instances not shown by the current search. Instances will be restarted to apply the new configuration. Locked instances and instances on hosts in maintenance mode are skipped.

dropzone.title: Drop some files here to import as OAuth Providers
dropzone.subtitle: Release to start importing

form.basicAuthDescription: Uses HTTP Basic Authentication to transmit the client id and secret, not common anymore.
form.scopesDescription: The OAuth2 scopes to request, make sure to include scopes for email and profile info when needed.
form.identifierPathDescription: The path used to extract the unique user identifier from the Info URL response (https://serdejsonpath.live).
form.emailPathDescription: The path used to extract the email from the Info URL response (https://serdejsonpath.live).
form.usernamePathDescription: The path used to extract the username from the Info URL response (https://serdejsonpath.live).
form.nameFirstPathDescription: The path used to extract the first name from the Info URL response (https://serdejsonpath.live).
form.nameLastPathDescription: The path used to extract the last name from the Info URL response (https://serdejsonpath.live).
form.loginBypass2faDescription: Allows users logging in with this provider to bypass their panel 2FA.
form.linkViewableDescription: Allows the user to see the connection and its identifier in the client UI.
form.userManageableDescription: Allows the user to connect and disconnect with this provider.

delete.title: Confirm OAuth Provider Deletion
delete.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}**?

form.matcherDescription: Decides whether this mapping applies to a user logging in with this provider.
form.scopesDescription: OAuth scopes that must all have been granted for this matcher to match.
form.pathDescription: The path used to extract the compared field from the Info URL response (https://serdejsonpath.live).
form.revokeUnmatchedDescription: Removes the assigned role or server subuser again when the matcher no longer matches on a later login.

delete.title: Delete OAuth Provider Mapping
delete.content: Are you sure you want to delete this mapping? This action cannot be undone.

modal.title: Look Up by Identifier
modal.notFound: No user found with that identifier.

alert.ddupBak: Ddup-Bak is Technology Preview software, it is technically not recommended for production use. If you acknowledge, sail ahead as you wish.
alert.btrfs: Btrfs requires additional setup on the node to work, please [see the documentation]({docsUrl}) for more details.
alert.zfs: ZFS requires additional setup on the node to work, please [see the documentation]({docsUrl}) for more details.
alert.pbs: The provided API token needs the following datastore ACLs: **DatastoreAudit** for usage and listing, **DatastoreBackup** for writing backups, and **DatastoreAdmin** (or equivalent prune/delete permissions) if backup deletion or pruning is enabled.

form.maintenanceEnabledDescription: If enabled, any server using this backup configuration will not be able to create new backups, or manage existing ones.
form.sharedDescription: If enabled, backups on this backup configuration will not be transferred between nodes, they will be assumed to be accessible by all nodes.

form.cronScheduleDescription: Format: second minute hour day month weekday.

notification.suspended: خادمك معلق حالياً. لا يمكن تنفيذ أي إجراءات حتى يتم رفع التعليق.
notification.suspendedAdmin: هذا الخادم معلق حالياً. بما أنك مسؤول، يمكنك لا يزال الوصول إلى الخادم، ولكن الإجراءات محدودة.
notification.nodeMaintenance: خادمك على عقدة قيد الصيانة حالياً.
notification.transferring: خادمك قيد النقل حالياً إلى عقدة أخرى.
notification.restoringBackup: خادمك يستعيد من نسخة احتياطية حالياً. يرجى الانتظار...

message.serverMarkedAs: تم وضع علامة على الخادم كـ {state}...
message.transferCompleted: اكتمل النقل بنجاح. جاري إعادة الاتصال بالخادم...
message.pullingImage: خادمك يسحب صورة docker حالياً. يرجى الانتظار...

eula.title: اتفاقية ترخيص Minecraft
eula.content: يتطلب خادم Minecraft منك الموافقة على [اتفاقية ترخيص المستخدم النهائي لـ Minecraft](https://minecraft.net/eula) قبل أن يبدأ.
eula.contentDetails: بالنقر على "قبول EULA"، أنت توافق على شروط EULA الخاصة بـ Minecraft وسيتم تحديث ملف **eula.txt** إلى **eula=true**.

javaVersion.title: Unsupported Java Version
javaVersion.content: This server is currently running an unsupported version of Java and cannot be started.
javaVersion.contentDetails: Please select a supported Docker image from the list below to continue starting the server.

details.normalizeCpuLoad: تطبيع تحميل المعالج (تم إزاحته إلى الحد الأقصى 100%)

forceStop.title: إيقاف العملية بالقوة
forceStop.content: الإيقاف القسري للخادم قد يؤدي إلى تلف البيانات.

settings.clickOnce: انقر مرة واحدة لفتح ملف أو مجلد
settings.preferPhysicalSize: إظهار الحجم الفعلي بدلاً من الحجم المنطقي

alert.collabConflictChanged: This file has been changed on disk outside of the editor (e.g. via SFTP).
alert.collabConflictDeleted: This file has been deleted on disk outside of the editor.

toast.collabSaveTimeout: The file could not be saved, the daemon did not respond in time.

tooltip.virtual: This item is virtual and does not exist on disk

revisions.title: File History
revisions.noRevisions: No revisions found for this file.

tooltip.restore: Restore this revision into the editor

cancelAllOperations.title: Cancel All Operations
cancelAllOperations.content: Are you sure you want to cancel all running file operations? Their progress will be lost.

unsavedChanges.title: تغييرات غير محفوظة
unsavedChanges.content: لديك تغييرات غير محفوظة في محرر الملفات. هل أنت متأكد أنك تريد مغادرة هذه الصفحة؟ إذا غادرت، ستفقد تغييراتك.

collabConflictLoadDisk.title: Load Disk Version
collabConflictLoadDisk.content: This will replace the editor contents with the file currently on disk. Unsaved changes will be lost.
collabConflictLoadDisk.contentMultiple: This will replace the editor contents for all {participants} people in this session with the file currently on disk. Unsaved changes will be lost.

draftRestore.title: Restore Draft
draftRestore.content: A draft of this file was found in your browser. Would you like to restore it?
draftRestore.contentHashMismatch: The file has been modified on the server since this draft was saved. Restoring the draft may overwrite those changes.

extractFile.title: Extract Archive
extractFile.extractedTo: The contents of {file} will be extracted into

copyRemote.title: نسخ الملفات عن بعد

deleteFile.multipleFilesWarning: لن تتمكن من استعادة محتويات الملفات التالية بمجرد حذفها.

form.recursive: Apply changes recursively to all files and subdirectories within this directory

massRename.title: Rename Files

affix.help: Both may include {token} for the number; a suffix appends a count to every name.

option.regexDescription: Treat the find text as a regex; reference groups with $1, $2 in the replacement.

numbering.help: Insert {token} in the find, replace, prefix, or suffix text where the number should appear.

massRename.conflictWarning: Resolve the highlighted name conflicts before renaming.

searchFiles.title: بحث الملفات
searchFiles.includeOversizedDescription: يتضمن الملفات التي تطابق المرشحات الأخرى ولكنها كبيرة جدًا للبحث فيها.

databases.title: قواعد البيانات

tooltip.limitReached: هذا الخادم محدود بـ {max} قواعد بيانات.

tooltip.offline: The instance must be running to create databases.
tooltip.noUser: This database has no user attached yet. Create a user to access it.
tooltip.limitReached: This instance is limited to {max} databases.

createDatabase.title: Create Database
createDatabase.content: Creates a new database with its own user inside this managed database instance. The credentials will be shown in the table afterwards.

deleteDatabase.title: Confirm Database Deletion
deleteDatabase.content: Are you sure you want to delete the database for user **{username}**? This permanently deletes the database and all data within it.

exportDatabase.title: Export Database
exportDatabase.content: Download a dump of this database. Large databases may take a while to prepare.

importDatabase.title: Import Database
importDatabase.content: Upload a dump to import into this database. Large imports may take a while to complete.

recreateDatabase.title: Confirm Database Recreation
recreateDatabase.content: Recreating a database will permanently delete all data in the **{name}** database and create a new empty one with the same name and user access.

tooltip.limitReached: This instance is limited to {max} users.

createUser.title: Create User
createUser.content: Creates a new user inside this managed database instance. The credentials will be shown in the table afterwards.

form.databaseHint: The database this user will be granted access to.

deleteUser.title: Confirm User Deletion
deleteUser.content: Are you sure you want to delete the user **{username}**? This cannot be undone.

forceKill.title: Forcibly Kill Database
forceKill.content: Forcibly killing a database can lead to data corruption.

applyDatabaseInstanceUpdate.title: Apply Template Update
applyDatabaseInstanceUpdate.content: This will update **{name}** to the latest template configuration. The database will be restarted to apply the new configuration.

deleteDatabaseInstance.title: Confirm Managed Database Deletion
deleteDatabaseInstance.content: Deleting a managed database is a permanent action, it cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the **{name}** database and remove all associated data.

exportInstance.title: Export Instance
exportInstance.content: Download a dump of this managed database instance. Large instances may take a while to prepare.

recreateDatabase.title: تأكيد إعادة إنشاء قاعدة البيانات
recreateDatabase.content: إعادة إنشاء قاعدة البيانات ستحذف بشكل دائم جميع البيانات في قاعدة البيانات **{name}** وتنشئ واحدة جديدة بنفس تفاصيل الاتصال.

deleteDatabase.title: تأكيد حذف قاعدة البيانات
deleteDatabase.content: حذف قاعدة البيانات هو إجراء دائم، لا يمكن التراجع عنه. سيؤدي هذا إلى حذف قاعدة البيانات **{name}** بشكل دائم وإزالة جميع البيانات المرتبطة.

alert.noTriggers: لم يتم تكوين أي مشغلات لهذا الجدول

condition.allMustBeTrue: جميع الشروط يجب أن تكون صحيحة:
condition.anyMustBeTrue: أي شرط يجب أن يكون صحيحاً:

card.content: على فاصل Cron {schedule}، التشغيل التالي هو {timestamp} - التشغيل الأخير كان {lastTimestamp}.
عند وصول النسخة الاحتياطية إلى الحالة `{status}`.
عند وصول مخرجات وحدة التحكم إلى سطر يحتوي على `{contains}`

empty.title: لم يتم تكوين خطوات
empty.description: هذا الجدول ليس لديه أي خطوات بعد. أضف بعض الإجراءات للبدء.

warning.unclosedIf: An "If" block is missing its "End If". All remaining steps run as part of the block.
warning.orphanBranch: There is an "Else", "Else If" or "End If" step without a matching "If" before it.

sleep.title: انتظار
sleep.description: Wait for a set amount of time before continuing with the next action.

ensure.title: ضمان
ensure.description: Stop the schedule here unless a condition is true.

if.title: If
if.description: Run the following steps only when a condition is true, until Else/End If. A matching End If is added automatically.

elseIf.title: Else If
elseIf.description: Run the following steps when no earlier branch ran and a condition is true.

else.title: Else
else.description: Run the following steps when no earlier branch of the If block ran.

exit.title: Exit
exit.description: Stop the schedule here, marking the run as successful or failed.

waitForState.title: Wait for Server State
waitForState.description: Wait until the server reaches a power state.

format.title: تنسيق
format.description: Build a text value from variables and store it in a variable.

form.formatStringDescription: سلسلة التنسيق. يمكن تضمين المتغيرات عن طريق تغليفها داخل {wrapper}.

matchRegex.title: مطابقة Regex
matchRegex.description: Extract parts of a text value using a regular expression.

waitForConsoleLine.title: انتظار سطر وحدة التحكم
waitForConsoleLine.description: Wait until the server console outputs a matching line.

renderer.compact: انتظار {timeout} لسطر وحدة التحكم الذي يحتوي على {contains}

sendCommand.title: إرسال أمر
sendCommand.description: Send a command to the server console.

sendPower.title: إرسال إشارة طاقة

renderer.compactAuto: Create a backup with an auto-generated name

restoreBackup.title: Restore Backup
restoreBackup.description: Stop the server and restore a backup of the server files.

selector.name: By Name
selector.oldestFirst: Match the oldest backup instead of the newest

form.warning: Restoring stops the server and overwrites its files. The schedule waits until the restore has finished before continuing. Avoid combining this step with power or server state triggers that could re-trigger the schedule.

deleteBackup.title: Delete Backup
deleteBackup.description: Delete a backup selected by the backup selector.

form.warning: This permanently deletes the selected backup, including its files on the node. Locked backups are skipped.

moveBackup.title: Move Backup
moveBackup.description: Move a backup selected by the backup selector into a backup group.

createDirectory.title: إنشاء مجلد
createDirectory.description: Create a new folder in the server files.

writeFile.title: كتابة ملف
writeFile.description: Write or append text to a file.

copyFile.title: نسخ ملف
copyFile.description: Copy a file to a new location.

decompressFile.title: فك ضغط ملف
decompressFile.description: Extract an archive into a folder.

updateStartupVariable.title: تحديث متغير بدء التشغيل
updateStartupVariable.description: Change the value of a startup variable.

updateStartupCommand.title: تحديث أمر بدء التشغيل
updateStartupCommand.description: Change the command used to start the server.

updateStartupDockerImage.title: تحديث صورة Docker
updateStartupDockerImage.description: Change the Docker image the server runs in.

tooltip.limitReached: This server is limited to {max} subusers.

form.emailPlaceholder: أدخل البريد الإلكتروني الذي يجب حفظ هذا المستخدم الفرعي به.
form.ignoredFilesDescription: Files and directories matching these patterns will be hidden from this subuser. Uses gitignore-style glob patterns (e.g. `*.env`, `secrets/`). Prefix a pattern with `!` to un-hide a path that a broader pattern would otherwise exclude.

removeSubuser.title: تأكيد إزالة المستخدم الفرعي
removeSubuser.content: هل أنت متأكد أنك تريد إزالة **{username}** من هذا الخادم؟

backups.title: النسخ الاحتياطية
backups.subtitle: {current} من {max} نسخة احتياطية كحد أقصى تم إنشاؤها.

tooltip.limitReached: هذا الخادم محدود بـ {max} نسخ احتياطية.

deleteBackup.title: تأكيد حذف النسخة الاحتياطية
deleteBackup.content: هل أنت متأكد أنك تريد حذف **{name}** من هذا الخادم؟

backupGroups.title: Backup Groups
backupGroups.noBackups: This group has no backups yet.

form.retentionCountDescription: Maximum number of usable backups to keep in this group. Leave empty for no limit.
form.retentionDaysDescription: Delete backups in this group older than this many days. Leave empty for no limit.
form.noRetentionDescription: With no retention set, this group is just a label and never deletes backups automatically.

deleteGroup.title: Confirm Backup Group Deletion
deleteGroup.content: Are you sure you want to delete **{name}**? {backups} in this group will become ungrouped and follow standard rotation.
deleteGroup.lockBackupsDescription: Locks all backups in this group before deletion so they cannot be rotated out automatically.

network.title: الشبكة
network.subtitle: {current} من {max} تخصيص كحد أقصى تم تعيينه.

removeAllocation.title: تأكيد إزالة التخصيص
removeAllocation.content: هل أنت متأكد أنك تريد إزالة **{allocation}** من هذا الخادم؟

startup.title: بدء التشغيل
startup.dockerImageDescription: صورة Docker المستخدمة لتشغيل هذا الخادم. يمكن تغييرها لاستخدام صورة مختلفة.
startup.dockerImageDescriptionCustom: صورة Docker المستخدمة لتشغيل هذا الخادم. تم تعيينها بواسطة مسؤول ولا يمكن تغييرها.

unsavedChanges.title: تغييرات غير محفوظة
unsavedChanges.content: لديك تغييرات غير محفوظة في متغيرات بدء التشغيل. هل أنت متأكد أنك تريد مغادرة هذه الصفحة؟ إذا غادرت، ستفقد تغييراتك.

startup.noVariables: لم يتم العثور على متغيرات بدء التشغيل لهذا الخادم.

toast.updated: تم تحديث سلوك البدء التلقائي للخادم.

reinstall.title: إعادة تثبيت الخادم
reinstall.content: إعادة تثبيت خادمك ستوقفه، ثم تعيد تشغيل برنامج التثبيت الذي قام بإعداده في البداية. **قد يتم حذف أو تعديل بعض الملفات أثناء هذه العملية، يرجى عمل نسخة احتياطية من بياناتك قبل المتابعة.**
